docs.title: Identity & Core Mission
docs.content: Name: Meftah Zineb. A high-achieving Computer Science and AI student specializing in Deep Learning, Robotics, and MLOps. Currently serving as a Future AI Research Intern at GE HealthCare Paris. Portfolio: zinebmeftah.github.io. Known for bridging the gap between theoretical AI research and production-ready software engineering.

docs.title: Academic Excellence & Honors
docs.content: Zineb is the Valedictorian (Major de Promotion) for both her L2 and L3 years at the University of Avignon (CERI), maintaining an academic average > 15/20[cite: 5, 11]. She previously completed an elite engineering preparatory cycle at the Higher National School of AI (ENSIA) in Algiers with Highest Honors (Mention Très Bien)[cite: 13, 16]. Her academic foundation is rooted in advanced mathematics, algorithmic theory, and stochastic optimization[cite: 6, 51].

docs.title: Professional Experience – GE HealthCare
docs.content: Incoming AI Research Intern (May 2026 – July 2026) at GE HealthCare, Paris[cite: 21, 23, 24]. Project focus: Automating the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) through Generative AI orchestration, involving the fine-tuning and integration of LLMs to optimize developer workflows and code production.

docs.title: Specialization: Robotics & MLOps
docs.content: Expertise in full MLOps training pipelines for autonomous robotic agents. Notable project: 'LeRobot - Reinforcement Learning & Robotics,' which utilizes Diffusion models and policy training for robotic manipulation (PushT)[cite: 33, 35]. Tools: Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face LeRobot[cite: 37].

docs.title: Scientific Writing & Research
docs.content: Published a technical article on Hugging Face: 'Tags Generation Dataset,' detailing a methodology for high-quality synthetic dataset generation through LLM reverse fine-tuning[cite: 46, 48, 49]. Skills include technical reporting, scientific article drafting, and rigorous model evaluation[cite: 53].

docs.title: Technical Stack: AI & Data Science
docs.content: Advanced proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face Hub[cite: 51]. Specialized in LLM Fine-tuning, Transformers, CNNs, Computer Vision (YOLO/OpenCV), and Reinforcement Learning[cite: 51]. Experience with synthetic data generation and graph-based optimization (A*, Dijkstra) [User HTML].

docs.title: Technical Stack: Software Engineering
docs.content: Expert-level Python developer[cite: 51]. Proficient in C/C++, Java, NestJS, Next.js, Node.js, PHP, and SQL[cite: 51]. Infrastructure skills: Docker, CI/CD, Linux/Bash (Ubuntu), GitFlow, and managing distributed server clusters (AMS project)[cite: 39, 44, 51].

docs.title: Project – GenAI Agents: Autonomous Web Generator
docs.content: Orchestrated autonomous LLM agents to transform natural language instructions into production-ready web architectures[cite: 28, 30]. Stack: Node.js, Python, OpenAI API, Selenium[cite: 31].

docs.title: Project – Robot Vision Simulator
docs.content: Browser-based interactive simulator featuring navigation, pick-and-place functionality, and natural-language command processing. Implements COCO-SSD for object detection and A* for pathfinding [User HTML].

docs.title: Languages & Certifications
docs.content: English: C2 Proficient (EF SET score: 92/100, February 2026). French: Bilingual/C1 level. Arabic: Native[cite: 53]. Certified in Deep Learning with PyTorch (DataCamp) and Responsive Web Design (freeCodeCamp) [User JSON].

docs.title: Leadership & Global Agility
docs.content: Selected for the U.S. Embassy’s Youth Ambassadors Program (AYLP) in Nevada, USA, for excellence in leadership and technology[cite: 55]. Former IT Lead for the Google Developer Student Club (GDSC), responsible for technical workshops and community growth[cite: 60]. Technical Lead for the Avignon AI Hackathon 2025, architecting an end-to-end Computer Vision pipeline[cite: 56, 57].

docs.title: Information for Recruiters
docs.content: Zineb is actively seeking internship or alternance opportunities in AI Engineering, Robotics, or Research. Her profile is distinguished by her 'Major de Promo' status, her ability to build end-to-end MLOps pipelines, and her experience with GE HealthCare in GenAI orchestration. For inquiries, prioritize discussing her work in Robotics/RL (LeRobot) and autonomous LLM agents.
